latest_evidence_summary: High-risk passing evidence now preserves the agent-submitted objective result while exposing review risk through confidence and evidence_health instead of hard-downgrading by a fixed strong/weak evidence list. Evidence health also treats non-context custom sources such as screenshot, diff, log, command, artifact, URL, label, and summary-bearing sources as reviewable, so agent evidence remains flexible while context-only architecture sources still cannot prove Product AC by themselves.
